title: Cold Storage Temperature Monitor T-101
description: Primary temperature sensor monitoring cold storage unit 1 maintaining product below 40 degrees Fahrenheit for food safety compliance
body: This temperature sensor monitors cold storage unit 1, which stores temperature-sensitive products requiring refrigeration below 40F. The sensor transmits readings every 5 minutes to the central monitoring system. Alerts are triggered when temperature exceeds 38F as early warning. Sensor calibrated annually per food safety regulations. Battery backup ensures continued monitoring during power outages.
location: Cold Storage Unit 1, North Wall, Height 6ft

title: Freezer Temperature Monitor T-102
description: Temperature sensor monitoring freezer unit maintaining product below zero degrees Fahrenheit for frozen goods storage
body: Freezer temperature sensor for unit holding frozen products at -10F to 0F. Critical for maintaining frozen food quality and safety. Sensor hardened for sub-zero operation. Dual probe design provides redundancy. Readings transmitted every minute during defrost cycles. Immediate alert if temperature rises above -5F.

title: Warehouse Humidity Sensor H-201
description: Humidity monitoring sensor for main warehouse floor tracking moisture levels to prevent product damage and mold growth
body: Humidity sensor monitoring ambient conditions in main warehouse zone A. Acceptable range is 30-50% relative humidity. High humidity can cause cardboard packaging degradation and mold risk. Low humidity increases static electricity and dust. HVAC system adjusts based on readings to maintain optimal conditions.

title: Dock Area Temperature Sensor T-103
description: Temperature monitoring at loading dock tracking conditions during product loading and unloading operations
body: Dock area temperature sensor monitors conditions at receiving dock doors 1-4. Important for tracking temperature exposure during loading and unloading, especially for temperature-sensitive products. Readings help determine how long dock doors can remain open during operations. Summer and winter operational guidelines adjust based on this data.

title: Security Motion Detector M-301
description: Motion detection sensor for after-hours security monitoring in high-value storage area
body: PIR motion sensor covering high-value product storage area. Active during non-operational hours from 10pm to 5am. Detection range 40 feet with 110-degree field of view. Integrated with security camera system to trigger recording on motion detection. Sensitivity adjusted to prevent false alarms from HVAC airflow.

title: Emergency Exit Door Sensor D-401
description: Door contact sensor monitoring emergency exit door status for security and safety compliance tracking
body: Magnetic contact sensor on emergency exit door zone C. Monitors door open/close status. Triggers alarm if door opened during armed security hours. Also logs door usage frequency for fire code compliance reporting. Battery-backed with 3-year lifespan. Tamper alert if sensor housing opened.
location: Zone C, Emergency Exit, Door Frame

title: Air Quality Sensor AQ-501
description: Air quality monitoring sensor tracking particulate matter and CO2 levels for employee health and safety
body: Multi-parameter air quality sensor measuring PM2.5 particulates and CO2 concentration. Important for maintaining healthy indoor air quality. PM2.5 threshold set at 35 ug/m3 per EPA standards. CO2 levels above 1000 ppm trigger increased ventilation. Data feeds into building management system for automatic HVAC adjustment.
location: Main Warehouse, Break Room Adjacent, Height 5ft

title: Floor Scale Load Cell W-601
description: Load cell sensor for receiving floor scale measuring inbound shipment weights for inventory verification
body: Industrial load cell sensor in receiving area floor scale. Rated capacity 10,000 lbs with 1 lb resolution. Used for verifying inbound shipment weights against purchase orders and carrier bills of lading. Calibrated quarterly using certified test weights. Integrated with WMS for automatic weight capture during receiving.

title: Compressed Air Pressure Sensor P-701
description: Pressure sensor monitoring compressed air system supplying pneumatic equipment throughout warehouse
body: Pressure transducer monitoring main compressed air header. Normal operating pressure 100-120 PSI. Low pressure alarm at 90 PSI indicates potential compressor issue or major leak. High pressure alarm at 130 PSI could indicate regulator failure. Reading feeds into maintenance dashboard for trend analysis.
location: Compressor Room, Main Header, After Dryer

title: Electrical Power Monitor E-801
description: Power monitoring sensor tracking electrical consumption and demand for energy management and cost optimization
body: Three-phase power monitoring sensor on main electrical feed. Tracks real-time consumption, peak demand, and power factor. Data used for energy cost management and identifying inefficient equipment. Alerts on unusual consumption patterns that may indicate equipment issues. Monthly reports generated for sustainability tracking.

title: Water Flow Sensor WF-901
description: Flow sensor monitoring water usage for leak detection and conservation management
body: Turbine flow sensor on main water supply. Monitors usage patterns to detect leaks, especially during non-operational hours when usage should be minimal. Sudden flow increases trigger alerts for investigation. Monthly consumption tracked for utility billing verification and conservation goals.

title: Propane Forklift Area Gas Detector G-1001
description: Combustible gas detector monitoring propane concentration in forklift charging and fueling area
body: Catalytic bead combustible gas detector in propane forklift area. Detects propane leaks from forklifts or fueling station. Alarm threshold set at 20% LEL (lower explosive limit) per safety standards. Triggers ventilation fans and alerts if threshold exceeded. Sensor tested monthly with calibration gas.
location: Propane Forklift Area, Fueling Station, Height 3ft

title: Warehouse Lighting Level Sensor L-1101
description: Light level sensor for automatic lighting control optimizing energy usage based on natural daylight availability
body: Photocell light sensor for daylight harvesting system in warehouse zone B with skylights. Measures ambient light levels and adjusts artificial lighting to maintain 50 foot-candles at work level. Reduces energy consumption on sunny days by dimming unnecessary lights. Integrated with lighting control system.
location: Zone B, Below Skylight Row 3, Height 20ft

title: Conveyor Motor Vibration Sensor V-1201
description: Vibration sensor monitoring conveyor drive motor for predictive maintenance and early failure detection
body: Accelerometer vibration sensor mounted on main sortation conveyor motor. Monitors vibration levels in three axes. Baseline established during normal operation. Increasing vibration trends indicate bearing wear or misalignment. Alerts maintenance before failure occurs. Part of predictive maintenance program reducing unplanned downtime.
location: Sortation Conveyor, Drive Motor, Motor Housing

title: Hydraulic Reservoir Level Sensor LV-1301
description: Fluid level sensor monitoring hydraulic oil reservoir for dock leveler system preventing low fluid damage
body: Float-type level sensor in hydraulic power unit reservoir serving dock levelers 1-8. Low level indicates potential leak in system requiring immediate attention. Critical low level shuts down hydraulic pump to prevent damage. Level checked against consumption trends to identify developing issues.
location: Dock Area, Hydraulic Power Unit, Reservoir
